project.name: Platform Testkit
project.description: Native integration library for test automation frameworks. Teams add the language-specific sub-module as a dependency to their framework base layer to get structured step tracking, OpenTelemetry tracing, @AffectedBy coverage annotations, retry support, soft assertions, and per-test failure classification. Results are published natively (not via output file parsing) with full context. Unlike platform-adapters, this requires test code to opt in to the richer API.
